prompt: Look at the dashboard code in dashboard/ and create a class diagram for it. I want to understand how config.py and main.py relate to each other.

assertions.description: Classes reflect what's actually in config.py and main.py (not invented)
Config loading/saving functionality is represented (from config.py)
FastAPI app or endpoint handling from main.py is represented
YAML is parseable and has 'classes' and 'relationships' top-level keys
Every relationship 'from' and 'to' references a class that exists in the classes list
